channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Juan Soto gets free luxury suite and up to 4 premium tickets for home games in $765M Mets deal
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Juan Soto gets free use of a luxury suite and up to four premium tickets behind home plate for regular-season and postseason New York Mets home games as part of his record $765 million, 15-year contract that was finalized Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Do the Rangers even care? They don't look like they do
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Rangers stink. GM Chris Drury is in crisis mode. They have lost 8 of 10. Drury has sent a memo to the rest of the league saying the Blueshirts are open for business, but that had little impact.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Lake Placid working with Italian officials as a backup sliding site for 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Lake Placid would play host to bobsled, luge and skeleton events for the 2026 Olympics if a track currently being rebuilt in Italy isn’t finished in time for the Milan-Cortina Games, officials said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark's Indiana Fever sold 90 times more tickets on StubHub this year than in 2023
item.description: The absurd numbers for Caitlin Clark keep coming in. StubHub revealed this week that Indiana Fever ticket sales on the site increased by 8,900% this season compared to last.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City crisis deepens with loss to Juventus in Champions League as Barcelona and Arsenal win
item.description: Manchester City plunged deeper into trouble in the Champions League by losing 2-0 at Juventus on Wednesday, the latest setback in a scarcely believable run of poor results for the ailing English champions. City dropped to 22nd place in the 36-team standings, with only the top 24 advancing.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What’s next for SF Giants after signing Adames? Posey admits there are more roster holes to fill
item.description: The Giants signed Adames to a franchise-record $182 million deal but still have more moves to make this offseason.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: NFL will consider replay assist for facemask penalties and other plays
item.description: IRVING, Texas (AP) — The NFL will consider expanding replay assist to include facemask penalties and other plays. Officials have missed several obvious facemask penalties this season, including two in a three-week span during Thursday night games.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Vince Carter and Tracy McGrady join Bills' ownership group as limited partners
item.description: IRVING, Texas (AP) — Basketball Hall of Famers Vince Carter and Tracy McGrady are among 10 limited partners who have joined the Buffalo Bills’ ownership group. The noncontrolling, minority interests were approved Wednesday by NFL team owners at the league’s winter meetings.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lindsey Vonn savors chance to test out World Cup course as a forerunner in comeback bid at age 40
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Lindsey Vonn tries to take her comeback step-by-step even if there's plenty of reason — and temptation — to look down the road. On Wednesday, the 40-year-old American ski racer was concentrating solely on testing out the Birds of Prey course as a forerunner.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Washington state proposes high school sports division for transgenders, separating them from female athletes
item.description: The Washington Interscholastic Activities Association (WIAA) announced a proposal to create a separate open division for transgender athletes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rory McIlroy says LIV Golf and PGA Tour match is giving back to fans of a divided sport
item.description: Two of the best players each from LIV Golf versus the PGA Tour in a televised match might remind golf fans what they're missing outside of the four majors. Rory McIlroy believes it shows they're at least trying to repair a divided sport.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox trade Garrett Crochet to Red Sox for prospect package
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have traded ace starter Garrett Crochet to the Red Sox for a prospect package. The White Sox are getting back catcher Kyle Teel, who is the 25th ranked prospect in baseball by MLB.com.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Rape allegation against Jay-Z won’t impact NFL's relationship with music mogul, Goodell says
item.description: NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell says a rape allegation against rapper Jay-Z won’t impact the NFL's relationship with the music mogul.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Floyd Mayweather addresses ‘rumors’ he was punched in attack by angry mob in London over Israel support
item.description: Boxing legend Floyd Mayweather denied being physically assaulted during a confrontation with an angry mob in London this week that reportedly was instigated by his support of Israel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Deebo Samuel doubles down on frustrations after social media post flagged by community notes on X
item.description: Niners star Deebo Samuel doubled down on a social media post he made this week expressing frustrations over the limited opportunities that he blamed for his lack of productivity.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joe Burrow's home broken into during Monday Night Football
item.description: Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow's home was broken into during Monday Night Football in the latest home invasion of a pro athlete in the U.S., authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Taylor Swift invited Caitlin Clark to Chiefs game amid distance from Brittany Mahomes at suites this year
item.description: WNBA star Caitlin Clark says pop star Taylor Swift invited her to watch a Kansas City Chiefs game in an interview with Time magazine Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Girls Basketball: Point Loma 36, Mar Vista 22
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in Point Loma with the Pointers hosting Mar Vista. Pointers win this one 36-22.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Bill Belichick's known ties to the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
item.description: Belichick, 72, is considered by many to be the greatest NFL head coach of all time and was the architect of the New England Patriots dynasty from 2001-2019.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Mendenhall excited to take over at Utah State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Bronco Mendenhall era has begun at Utah State. Mendenhall was introduced as the Aggies new head football coach Monday, and the school is hoping he can turn the program around.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press. The deal could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Juan Soto's $765M deal with the Mets is the largest in MLB history. Here's who he passed
item.description: Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed to a record $765 million, 15-year contract Sunday night, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James misses 1st game this season, sidelined versus Portland due to left foot soreness
item.description: LeBron James will sit out Sunday's game against the Portland Trail Blazers due to left foot soreness, the NBA career scoring leader's first missed game of the season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A hamstring injury silenced George Pickens. His Steelers teammates picked up the slack vs. Browns
item.description: Pickens missed the first game of his career on Sunday, watching from the sideline in Pittsburgh's 27-14 win over Cleveland that showcased the team's receivers group runs deeper than the unit's talented if occasionally petulant star.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Darnold delivers for Vikings with career-high 347 yards and 5 TDs to beat Falcons, Cousins 42-21
item.description: Darnold added yet another highlight to his brilliant first season with the Vikings, passing for 347 yards and five touchdowns, both career highs, in a 42-21 victory over the foundering Falcons on Sunday to stretch their winning streak to six games.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Jets take on the Blackhawks Saturday following overtime win
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (19-8, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (8-16-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 4 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Winnipeg Jets visit the Chicago Blackhawks after the Jets defeated the Buffalo Sabres 3-2 in overtime.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks' losing streak reaches 4 games after 4-2 loss to Bruins
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Brad Marchand and Morgan Geekie each scored two goals, and the Boston Bruins beat the struggling Chicago Blackhawks, 4-2 , on Wednesday night. Boston posted its third consecutive win — all in the past four days. It rallied for a 3-2 overtime victory against Detroit on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
